# PSL Live 2026
> Comprehensive coverage, live streaming updates, points tables, and structural logistics for the HBL Pakistan Super League 11 (2026).

## General Information
- **Tournament Dates:** March 26, 2026 - May 3, 2026
- **Format:** T20 Franchise Cricket
- **Status:** All 44 matches are strictly played behind closed doors (no crowd) due to austerity and security measures.
- **Venues:** Reduced to only 2 officially active stadiums:
  - Gaddafi Stadium (Lahore) - 22 Matches (Including Playoffs & Final)
  - National Bank Stadium (Karachi) - 22 Matches (League stage)

## Core Site Structure
- `/` - Homepage featuring latest updates and team grid.
- `/psl-11-2026-schedule` - The full 44-match structural timetable.
- `/psl-live` - Authorized free and premium digital streaming broadcasters.
- `/points-table` - Live team standings and Net Run Rate (NRR) tracking.

## Official 2026 Franchises (Squad Pages)
- `/lahore-qalandars-squad` (Captain: Shaheen Afridi)
- `/quetta-gladiators-squad` (Captain: Saud Shakeel)
- `/islamabad-united-squad` (Captain: Shadab Khan)
- `/karachi-kings-squad` (Captain: David Warner)
- `/multan-sultans-squad` (Captain: Mohammad Rizwan)
- `/peshawar-zalmi-squad` (Captain: Babar Azam)
- `/rawalpindi-pindiz-squad` (Captain: Mohammad Rizwan)
- `/hyderabad-kingsmen-squad` (Captain: Marnus Labuschagne)

## SEO Technical Notes
This project utilizes modern Next.js 14 App Router architectures explicitly delivering static exports and SSR optimization utilizing integrated JSON-LD schema parsing.
